title: Net-ball
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Net-Ball''' was a sport played on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and probably many other [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]. [[Dael Levare]] was a player.

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:Netball|Netball]] is a real game, the real-world game has lots of female players which means has quite a bit of male interest, its possible the Corellian game is similar if not the same.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1stm}}
